positive: A minimalist, stylized design featuring a pair of abstract, interconnected constellations and geometric celestial bodies, rendered in crisp, single-line vector art with a modern scientific illustration feel. The composition should be perfectly centered, suitable for a repeating pattern or a single chest print. Use a limited, high-contrast palette of deep indigo blue, vibrant electric teal, and pure off-white lines. Emphasize clean, negative space, strong silhouette definition, and geometric precision. The style must evoke a sophisticated blend of Art Deco elegance and modern celestial cartography. Graphic novel aesthetic, highly detailed linework, centered symmetry, print-ready resolution, flat lay composition, vector graphic.
